-mtune=generic -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/odu_split_6.dir/du.cpp.o -o ../du_split_6/odu  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib libodu_base.a
